full_text:
Guo Huai (Boji) 郭淮 (伯濟)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Guo Huai (郭淮), styledBoji (伯濟), was born in Yang Qu City, Tai Yuan Prefecture (Presently Tai Yuan City in Shan Xi Province). Served Wei and fought extensively against Shu. Brother of Guo Pei. Father of Guo Tong. Guo Huai was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Guo Huai lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
